mapper.select: select id as id, image_url as imageUrl from `t_nail_order` where FIND_IN_SET (id,#{id})
mapper.update: update `t_nail_order` set username=#{username}, mobile=#{mobile}, step=#{step}, current_step=#{currentStep}, image_url=#{imageUrl}, result_image_url=#{resultImageUrl}, image_name=#{imageName}, comefrom=#{comefrom}, nail_config_id=#{nailConfigId}, nail_pictureframe_Id=#{nailPictureFrameId}, nail_count_detail=#{nailCountDetail}, height=#{height}, width=#{width}, third_flag=#{thirdFlag}, update_date = now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS id ,t.username AS username ,t.mobile AS mobile ,t.step AS step ,t.current_step AS currentStep ,t.image_url AS imageUrl ,t.image_name AS imageName ,t.comefrom AS comefrom ,t.nail_config_id AS nailConfigId ,t.nail_pictureframe_Id AS nailPictureFrameId ,t.nail_count_detail AS nailCountDetail ,t.height AS height ,t.width AS width ,t.create_date AS createDate ,t.update_date AS updateDate ,nf.nail_type AS nailType ,tnp.color_name AS colorName FROM t_nail_order t LEFT JOIN t_nail_config nf ON t.nail_config_id = nf.id LEFT JOIN t_nail_pictureframe tnp ON t.nail_pictureframe_Id = tnp.id where t.id = #{id} order by t.id limit 1

SELECT t.id AS id ,t.username AS username ,t.mobile AS mobile ,t.step AS step ,t.current_step AS currentStep ,t.image_url AS imageUrl ,t.image_name AS imageName ,t.comefrom AS comefrom ,t.nail_config_id AS nailConfigId ,t.nail_pictureframe_Id AS nailPictureFrameId ,t.nail_count_detail AS nailCountDetail ,t.height AS height ,t.width AS width ,t.create_date AS createDate ,t.update_date AS updateDate ,ifnull(t.third_flag,0) AS thirdFlag ,nf.nail_type AS nailType ,tnp.color_name AS colorName FROM t_nail_order t LEFT JOIN t_nail_config nf ON t.nail_config_id = nf.id LEFT JOIN t_nail_pictureframe tnp ON t.nail_pictureframe_Id = tnp.id where t.id = #{id} order by t.id limit 1

SELECT t.id AS id ,t.username AS username ,t.mobile AS mobile
,t.current_step AS currentStep ,t.image_url AS imageUrl ,t.image_name AS imageName ,t.comefrom AS comefrom ,t.nail_config_id AS nailConfigId ,t.nail_pictureframe_Id AS nailPictureFrameId
,t.height AS height ,t.width AS width ,ifnull(t.third_flag,0) AS thirdFlag ,t.create_date AS createDate ,t.update_date AS updateDate ,nf.nail_type AS nailType ,tnp.color_name AS colorName FROM t_nail_order t LEFT JOIN t_nail_config nf ON t.nail_config_id = nf.id LEFT JOIN t_nail_pictureframe tnp ON t.nail_pictureframe_Id = tnp.id where t.id = #{id} order by t.id limit 1
SELECT * FROM t_nail_order t ORDER by id desc

SELECT t.id as id, t.username as username, t.mobile as mobile,
ifnull(t.current_step ,'') as currentStep, t.image_url as imageUrl, t.result_image_url as resultImageUrl, t.image_name as imageName, t.comefrom as comefrom, t.nail_config_id as nailConfigId, t.nail_pictureframe_Id as nailPictureFrameId, t.nail_count_detail as nailCountDetail, t.width as width, t.height as height, ifnull(nf.nail_type,'') as nailType, ifnull(tnp.color_name,'') as colorName, ifnull(tns.status,0) as status, t.create_date as createDate, t.update_date as updateDate FROM t_nail_order t left join t_nail_config nf on t.nail_config_id = nf.id left join t_nail_pictureframe tnp on t.nail_pictureframe_Id = tnp.id left join t_nail_secret tns on t.id = tns.order_id
t.image_name = #{keyword} OR t.mobile = #{keyword}
ORDER by t.id desc
